product_results.title: Nike Men's Sneaker,Running Shoes, Anthracite/Metallic Silver/Black, 11

summary.text: Customers find these shoes to be of good quality and very comfortable, particularly noting they are lightweight. The shoes look good and maintain the same design. They are durable and break in nicely. However, customers have different opinions on the fit.

authors_reviews.title: To small
authors_reviews.text: Shoes were amazing but unfortunately to small. Ive been wearing size 11 nike for years. These fit like a 9 or 10 at best.
authors_reviews.author: Wade Bader

authors_reviews.title: Great fit Nike quality
authors_reviews.text: Excellent style great fit , I'm really glad that there not that silvery, that there are a darker then I thought this is a good thing . Nike quality nice fitting sole thanks
authors_reviews.author: anthony

authors_reviews.title: Used shoe
authors_reviews.text: 1 of the papers was missing in the shoe and it looks used the box looks damaged and yeah idk
authors_reviews.author: Vahab

authors_reviews.title: Que ses les meilleurs
authors_reviews.text: Nike,reste la meilleure compagnie de souliers au monde fiable et durable !
authors_reviews.author: Pascal P.

authors_reviews.title: No regrets
authors_reviews.text: Boy this shoes for my husband birthday and he loved it
authors_reviews.author: Stacey Ann brown

authors_reviews.title: width
authors_reviews.text: Nice lookin shoes but too narrow. Couldn't order wide fit.
authors_reviews.author: David Williams
